title: Woman Predicted Her Future Husband
transcript:
A dad was filming his 4 year old daughter playfully asking who she wants to marry, and all we can say is she already had her life planned out.
She's saying "I do" to the groom she predicted she'd marry when she was just 4 years old.
Hard to believe? Here's the video to prove it.
...
Yep, little Kira Jade, dressed as a princess, told her dad she was destined to wed Timmy Nixon
"Kira Jade, you knew that you really liked Timothy Nixon?"
"Yeah, I just knew. There was something about him."
Cupid may have shot his arrow at Sunday school, but for Timmy, it wasn't love at first sight.
"Her fifth birthday party, where she kissed me on the back of the head, and I was not impressed. I mean, I was not happy with that."
They lost touch in high school,
then one morning in church, all those years later,
Cupid took aim again, this time at Timmy.
"I really took notice of her profoundly one morning at church, and I remember talking to my parents: 'I think something just happened. I'm going to marry this girl.'"
Now get this, Kira Jade had no recollection of what she said way back in 1992.
And love has lasted. They've just celebrated their 10th wedding anniversary.
From "I'm going to marry Timmy" to "actually marrying Timmy".
